course_title: PRACTICUM IN RESOURCE AND ENERGY DEMAND ANALYSIS II
description: The second in a 2-course sequence that comprises the capstone course in Resource and Energy Demand Analysis, in which students synthesize their training in a simulated "real world" analysis. The courses is designed to reflect the full range of professional responsibilities of a resource/energy demand analyst, from data retrieval/cleaning, to analysis, to reporting.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: A A E 772and declared in Agricultural  Applied Economics: Resource and Energy Demand Analysis
